docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL NO APPEARANCES; NO PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY VERITABLE VEGETABLE AS TO DEFENDANT GOODMAN, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
